zh.lifeSummary: 當John Ellingsen Lynn於1585年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾時，他的父親John Lynn25歲，母親Elizabeth Rissa Kirke25歲。他於大約1599年與Elizabeth Jones在蘇格蘭艾斯爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1635年9月8日在他的家鄉享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lynn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhloinn and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn ).
Scottish: variant of   Lyne   3.

English: habitational name from any of several places so called in Norfolk, in particular King's Lynn, an important center of the medieval wool trade. The placename is probably from an Old Welsh word cognate with Gaelic linn ‘pool, stream’.

variants.name: Lyn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Ding, Fatt, Tov, Yol, Yun.
Scottish and English: variant of   Lynn  .
Probably also an altered form of Dutch Van der Lijn (see Vanderlinden ).

variants.name: Linn
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lynn  .
German: habitational name from a place called Linn, named with lin ‘swamp, bog, marsh’.
German: from an ancient Germanic personal name, Linto, formed with Old High German lind(i) ‘soft’.

variants.name: Lenn
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Lynn  .
Jewish(Ashkenazic): variant of   Len  .

variants.name: Flynn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Connor, Declan, Kieran, Aidan, Brigid, Cathal, Dermot, Donal, Eamon, John Patrick, Kiernan.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Floinn ‘descendant of Flann’, a byname meaning ‘red(dish), ruddy’. There were families of this name in various parts of Ireland. This name has also been Anglicized as Lindsay .
English: from Middle English Flin, representing the Old Norse male personal name Fleinn.

variants.name: Lynne
meanings: Scottish or English: variant of   Lynn  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: Ellingsen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Per, Egil, Nils, Selmer, Svein, Sven.
Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name Elling, from Old Norse Erlingr, meaning ‘son of an earl’.
North German: habitational name from a place called Ellinghausen, Ellingesen, or similar.

variants.name: Ellingboe
meanings: Norwegian (Ellingbø): habitational name from the farm name Ellingbø in eastern Norway, from the personal name Erling (see Ellingsen ) and Old Norse bǿr ‘farm’.

variants.name: Ellingson
meanings: Americanized form of Norwegian Ellingsen and of its rare Swedish cognate Ellingsson.

en.lifeSummary: When John Ellingsen Lynn was born in 1585, in Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Lynn, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Rissa Kirke, was 25. He married Elizabeth Jones about 1599, in Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 8 September 1635, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

ko.lifeSummary: John Ellingsen Lynn(이)가 1585년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lynn(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Rissa Kirke(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1599년 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 Elizabeth Jones(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1635년 9월 8일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.
